speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Thanks Sam! Now for some sporting brilliance from our own backyard. Rising middle-distance star Angus Hincksman has absolutely smashed it at the Australian Athletics Championships, setting a brand new world record in the process!

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] What a legend! And the Australian Sports Commission is making moves too, strengthening their pipeline of women leaders to drive more inclusive decision-making across the sporting sector. Plus, Para athletes are getting extra support for the Commonwealth Games with new grants to address rising costs.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Brilliant stuff! And Cook Islands athlete Max Teuruaa delivered a cracking performance at our Athletics Championships too, completing the decathlon with 5,986 points - the second-highest score in Cook Islands history. Sport truly brings out the best in all of us, doesn't it?
